metrics.verdict: New Garden and Glienicke Bridge with a closure check
metrics.ticket: For three to five people moving together, check the Berlin ABC 24-hour small-group ticket first. It can be simpler than separate tickets.
warnings: Do not promise yourself a Cecilienhof interior until the official closure notice changes.
This route is stronger for history lovers than first-time palace visitors.
Keep one easy return route open before walking toward the bridge.
